blocks.text: Status: on track. Fieldwork is complete, the analysis is closing out, and we are drafting the final read-out for {{fact:f:E-2019-001.client}} leadership. No open issues require executive action this period.

items: Finished the scheduling analysis across both production lines; the changeover pattern explains the bulk of lost hours.
Closed the purchasing review, including the supplier freight surcharges raised at the working session.
Reconciled order-to-cash timing with the billing records; handoff delays sit in two approval steps.
Draft read-out to Mr. Andersen for factual review.
Final presentation to the leadership team, then handoff of the implementation plan.

blocks.text: The engagement remains within the agreed fixed fee of {{fact:f:E-2019-001.fee}}. Two of three installments have been invoiced per the engagement letter; the final installment follows the read-out. No scope changes to report.
